parsed_review.summary: CP00-872 is a descriptor-only RP28 Marketplace closeout pack covering the P09 Claude review packet, Hermes evidence packet, and next-handoff rows (RP28.P09.M06.S09-RP28.P09.M10.S10, 84 units, Risk C). It does NOT claim production_ready=true, runtime_ready, or enterprise trust: manifest.json (production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor, opens_runtime=false, writes_product_state=false, uses_real_client_data=false), command-evidence.json (production_ready=false, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false), and construction-inspection.json (PENDING, production_ready=false) all agree, so there is no premature production_ready claim to refute. Verified by direct Read/Grep/Glob source inspection: (1) MARKETPLACE_CP872_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:513) carries correct risk_class C, unit_count 84, first/last unit RP28.P09.M06.S09/RP28.P09.M10.S10, upstream CP00-871, next CP00-873 / RP29.P00.M00.S01, and a descriptor-only production_ready_flag; the validate script (validate-rp28-marketplace-custom-ai-apps-contract.mjs:139) enforces the CP871->CP872 upstream chain. (2) Deliverable distribution independently counted from the included_units = {implementation:55, claude_review:12, security_audit:8, test:4, ui:4, hermes_evidence:1} = 84, matching MARKETPLACE_CP872_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:2072), the prompt baseline, and the manifest; phase RP28.P09:84 and micro counts M06:12/M07:22/M08:20/M09:20/M10:10 also match, and validateMarketplaceCp872ClaudeReviewCloseoutHandoffCoverage (validators.js:3364) checks every distribution plus duplicate/RP28-only/title-row drift. (3) validateMarketplaceCp872ClaudeReviewCloseoutHandoffDescriptor (validators.js:3400) and MARKETPLACE_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js:35) hard-reject runtime execution, app submission/install, install-receipt emission, connector-runtime load, custom-AI execution, permission-decision/audit-event/product-state writes, connector secrets, OAuth tokens, prompt/completion payloads, and real client data; the contract JSON latest_pack/latest_projection (MarketplaceCp872ClaudeReviewCloseoutHandoffDescriptor) and validation block (valid=true, latest_pack_id=CP00-872, no_write_attestation) agree. (4) Authority boundary holds everywhere: Claude is read_only with claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, and human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true at CP00-873; the Hermes packet is control-plane only (emits_runtime_receipt=false, writes_product_state=false, no_real_data=true) and not embedded in product runtime. (5) model.test.js:1054-1090 cover binding/coverage, the runtime-closed descriptor (case_set row_count 84, app_submission_executed/permission_decision_written/audit_event_written all false), and contract-projection currency. (6) CP178+ review hardening satisfied: auth preflight passed (readiness-report.json exit_code 0, 1445-byte valid JSON result, no auth failure / 0-byte stdout / malformed JSON), prompt 2555B < 25600B with prompt_contains_full_diff_or_source=false, read-only tools only (Read/Grep/Glob, forbidden_tools_present=false), review schema present, and summary-only correctly disallowed (Risk C + security/audit + review-evidence deliverables). Provenance: command-evidence.json records the 3-command pre-review local matrix (node --check, contract validate, model test) at exit 0 — agent-reported, not re-run under this read-only role — with the full deterministic suite expected post-review per the established CP00-871 pattern; the pending claude-review-result.json (review_pending, valid_review_receipts=[]), construction-inspection.json, and adjudication.md are expected pre-review placeholders, and the inherited CP00-871 receipt is explicitly not counted. Unrelated dirty worktree files (scripts/progress-control-room-data.mjs, tools/progress-control-room/index.html, workbook/*, the v2.0 docx, and the LDIP invalid-attempt fixture) are correctly listed under changed-file-scope.unrelated_dirty_files_preserved and are not attributed to this pack. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; PASS. This receipt does not confer final human/enterprise-trust approval, which remains an external boundary outside this CP closeout goal and therefore does not set blocks_goal_closeout.
